## 🎯 Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Build configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security update

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have removed unnecessary console.log / debug statements

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the changes in different browsers (if frontend changes)

### Documentation

- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated API documentation (if API changes)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md

### Database (if applicable)

- [ ] I have created necessary database migrations
- [ ] I have tested the migrations (upgrade and downgrade)
- [ ] I have updated the database schema documentation

### Dependencies

- [ ] I have not added unnecessary dependencies
- [ ] I have updated requirements.txt / package.json if dependencies changed
- [ ] All new dependencies are documented

## 🔄 Migration Notes

<!-- If this PR requires migration steps, document them here -->

**Backend:**
```bash
# Example migration commands
alembic upgrade head
```

**Frontend:**
```bash
# Example migration commands
npm install
```
